_comment: Content-quality expectations for the eval/training dataset, enforced by great-expectations-validate AFTER the JSON Schema structure gate (eval-dataset-validate). Edit to tune. Each entry maps to a class on great_expectations.expectations; kwargs are passed through. Delete this file to fall back to the column-inferred defaults in run_great_expectations.py. Mirror the eval-dataset contract (evals/eval-dataset.schema.json): id|case_id identifier + a question|prompt field.
